raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee bija tur pee Dah-
wida trihs Deenas/ ehde un dseh-
re/ Jo winnu Brahti bij preeksch
teem fatatsijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir tee/ kas tuwaki pee
teem dsihwoja/lithds Jhsatcharam/
un Sebularam/ un Nawtakam/
tee neffe Maises us Ehsateem/ un
Kameeteem/ un Sirg-Ehsateem/
un us Wehrtcheem/ Miltus par
Ehdeenu/Wihgu-Pihtes un Ra-
sinn-Pihtes / un Wihmu / un
Etji/ un Wehrschus / un Awis
leela Pulkâ/ jo eeksch Israelta bi-
ja Lihgsiniba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N Dahwids turreja
Runnas ar teem Ah-
wersteem / un Kaptei-
nehu/ un ar wiﬀeem Leelem-
Kungeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids tazzija ns
wiﬀu Israeta Drauds: Ja juhs
schkeetat labbu effam/ un ja tas
no ta KUNGA muhfu Deewa
irr/ tad fuhtifim mehs wiﬀur
apkahrt pee muhfeem zitteem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Brahteem / wiﬀas Israet
Walsts/ un pee teem Preeste-
reem un Lewiteem/ kas pee teem
Pilsfahtos un Preeksch-Pilsfal-
tos irr/ ka tee pee mums fa-eet
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un atweddisim pee mum-
atlak to Deewa Schkirstu / j
Saula Laika mehs to ne efam-
mekleifschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiﬀa Drau-
dsiba/ ka ta bij darriht / jo sch
WalloDa patikke wiﬀeem Lau-
dim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tapulzinaja Dahwid-
wiﬀu Israetu no Egiptes Siko-
ras/ kamehr nahk us Eematu
ka tee to Deewa Schkirstu n
Kiriat-Jearim atnestu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs Dahwids a-
wiﬀu Israetu us Baalu/ taet
Kiriat-Jearims/ kas eeksch Ju-
da gull/ ka wiﬀsch no turrene-
atwestu to Deewa Schkirstu te
KUNGA/ kas us teem Kerubin-
dsihwo / ka Wahrdos tur toh-
peetaukts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee wedde to Deew-
Schkirstu us janneem Ratteen
no Abinadaba Namna. Un
Usus un Akijus dsinne tohe
Rattus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids un wiﬀs J-
frates spehteja preeksch Deewu-
ar wiﬀu Spehkt/ tik labbi a-
Dseefmahm / ka ar Kohflehem/
un ar Sohma-Stabulehm/ un
ar Bungahm/ un ar Putkstent-
scheein/ un ar Trummnetehin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet kad tee ithds Kidon-
Rtohnani nahze / tad issteepe
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
